title: Support - App page Go button no wifi [New]
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app shows "Something is wrong" screen when tapping Go in Support > App with Wi-Fi turned off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure Wi-Fi is turned OFF on the device.
3. Navigate to the Support section from the Home screen.
4. Tap on the 'App' option within Support.
5. Tap the 'Go' button on the screen.
expected: The app should detect that Wi-Fi is off and display a user-friendly message or prompt indicating that an internet connection is required, or gracefully handle the state without crashing or showing an error screen.
